description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and deploy, using the default runner image and no explicit services. Define a global before_script that runs apt-get update -yq, curls the Node.js 6 setup script and pipes it to bash, installs nodejs, git, zip, gzip, and tar, installs bower and grunt-cli globally via npm, runs npm install, and runs bower install --allow-root --no-interactive. In the build stage add a grunt_build job that runs the command grunt and publishes any generated .zip files as artifacts with paths ./*.zip. In the deploy stage add a marketplace_deploy job that runs grunt then executes curl -F "file=@./saasdm-phoenix.zip" http://marketplace.webpich.com/api/marketplace/spa/token-$MARKETPLACE_TOKEN, and configure it to run only on the master branch. No jobs are defined for the test stage, and the before_script applies to all jobs.
